input.input:
Task: Search the live web for notable events on the date 2026-05-05 (UTC). Produce a concise, well-sourced report in Markdown and save it to /_outputs/today_2026-05-05_events.md. Use Tavily CLI / write-report style and keep the output under ~800 words.

Required sections (use as few files as practical — single file):
- Title and date
- One-line summary of whether today is 'important' globally (yes/no) and why
- Top 5 notable items (global) with 1-line descriptions and 1 source link each (choose "top 5 with ties" if there are ties)
- Holidays & observances worldwide (bullet list with country/region)
- Notable anniversaries (historical events tied to this date)
- Major current news headlines (3–6), each with a one-line summary and source link
- Short note on any notable market / tech / cultural events happening today (if applicable)

Constraints/details for the agent:
- Use reliable sources (major news outlets, official holiday calendars, Wikipedia for anniversaries if needed). Include direct links.
- If no major global events found, state that clearly and list relevant local/sector items.
- Keep language neutral and factual.
- Return only: the path(s) written and a single-sentence short summary of the report (do NOT paste the file contents into the response).

Deliverable (required): write file to /_outputs/today_2026-05-05_events.md and return only the path plus a short summary. Thank you.

output: I was blocked from running the Tavily CLI (tvly) by an approval step. May I proceed to run tvly (tvly --status and subsequent searches) to fetch live web sources for 2026-05-05?
